expected_behaviors: Captures systems discussed: event sourcing, PostgreSQL event store, Redis streams, read model projector
Notes architecture decision: PostgreSQL over EventStoreDB with rationale
Identifies technical patterns: CQRS, event upcasters, dual-write period, feature flags
Tracks technical references: NOTIFY/LISTEN, schema versioning, background projector
Identifies technical debt/risks: migration path for 2M orders, performance monitoring
anti_patterns: Summarizes the meeting instead of extracting technical content
Misses the CQRS/event sourcing pattern discussion
Confuses the technology choices (e.g., says EventStoreDB was chosen)
Tracks action items instead of technical discussion
